title: JwtVerifyConfig
description: Configuration for core.crypto.jwt-verify. SECURITY: callers MUST set `expectedAlgorithm` or `allowedAlgorithms` to bind the verifier to specific algorithm(s). Leaving them absent makes the verifier trust the token's self-declared `alg` header, which permits the CVE-2015-9235 alg-confusion attack. The pack rejects unset-and-no-env-override calls with `JWT_VERIFIER_ALGORITHM_REQUIRED`.

expectedAlgorithm.description: Single allowed JWT algorithm. Either this OR `allowedAlgorithms` MUST be set.

allowedAlgorithms.description: Allow-list of JWT algorithms accepted by this verifier. Either this OR `expectedAlgorithm` MUST be set.
